summary: Mammography offers a near-perfect alignment with your procedural strengths and your desire for a predictable, daytime-only schedule with no evening or on-call requirements. However, the high levels of stress and the significant risk of burnout due to physical strain and emotional intensity directly challenge your primary goals of personal wellbeing and long-term career sustainability. Ultimately, this role presents a significant trade-off where the excellent work-life balance may be overshadowed by a high-stakes clinical environment and the physical toll of the work.
